insight_summary: Flags That Make Up The Union Jack is gaining traction with your audience. Post soon with a hook that invites debate or personal reaction.

next_post.hook: British audiences are split on Flags That Make Up The Union Jack, and that is exactly why it works.
next_post.content_idea: Frame it around whether the flag still unites or divides — use one real example from daily British life, then ask viewers which side they are on.
next_post.format: Yes/No debate post with comment-bait question overlay
next_post.reason_it_will_perform_better: This works because it taps into British identity, which consistently drives strong engagement with your audience, and uses a debate format they respond to well.
